# Meegrow Labs

> Meegrow Labs is an AI growth company. Growth, engineered. Search didn't die — it moved: customers now ask machines, and we make sure you're the answer they get. We run SEO/GEO for clients, build growth software (Antidote, Antidote Research, Meegrow Social), and publish "Zero to AI Hero," a free bilingual (English + हिंदी) course that teaches anyone to use and build with AI from scratch.

## Core

- [Meegrow Labs — Growth, engineered](https://meegrowlabs.com/): Company home — services, products, and the free course.
- [Contact / Talk to us](https://tally.so/r/444qZ5): Intake form to start a conversation. Services and product access are invite-led, not self-serve.

## Services

- [SEO / GEO](https://meegrowlabs.com/seo-geo/): Done-for-you visibility engine. We score you across search, AI engines, maps, and links, then close every gap so ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews cite you — not your competitor.

## Products

- [Antidote](https://meegrowlabs.com/antidote/): A marketing engine that drafts content, publishes blogs and social posts, watches competitors, and briefs you every morning. You approve, it ships.
- [Antidote Research](https://meegrowlabs.com/research/): An SEO research suite — keywords, backlinks, site audits, rank tracking, local SEO, and schema. Every result turns into a task on your board.
- [Meegrow Social](https://meegrowlabs.com/social/): Plan, schedule, publish, and measure social content across Facebook, Instagram, Google Business Profiles, LinkedIn, and YouTube from one calendar.

## Zero to AI Hero (free course)

- [Course hub](https://meegrowlabs.com/learn/): 150+ free, ~2-minute lessons taking absolute beginners from "what is a file?" to building with AI. Every lesson is available in English and हिंदी.
- [Watch the full course on YouTube (English)](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5ogw-CYz9s83NYo3HsDHQqsuUwJ-qxa7)
- [पूरा कोर्स देखें (हिंदी)](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL5ogw-CYz9s-G3UreFbcfFhMPLQRsc70U)

## Writing

- [Meegrow Labs Blog](https://blog.meegrowlabs.com): Guides and deep-dives on growth, SEO/GEO, and the fundamentals taught in Zero to AI Hero.

## Notes

- Antidote, Antidote Research, and Meegrow Social are separate products; access is invite-led through the contact form.
- Course narration is AI-generated; all content is human-reviewed.
- Canonical host is https://meegrowlabs.com (non-www).
